hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && ! echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.test\.(ts|tsx)$'; then npm run lint -- --no-warn-ignored && npm run typecheck; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.test\.(ts|tsx)$'; then npm test; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
